{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura audience platform
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura audience platform]] is where [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] watched the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
